raw: {"citation_tightness": {"verdict": "good", "note": "All factual claims have adjacent citations [1]-[8]."}, "hedging_appropriateness": {"verdict": "good", "note": "Prose uses hedging language like 'projected', 'estimated', and 'may omit' to reflect uncertainty."}, "tone_consistency": {"verdict": "good", "note": "Tone remains evidence-grounded with no promotional language detected."}, "flow": {"verdict": "acceptable", "note": "Sections follow logical order but Comparative and Efficacy sections overlap in CMS estimates."}, "completeness": {"verdict": "good", "note": "Major evidence rows (regulatory status, cost savings, limitations) are addressed per completeness checklist."}}

citation_tightness.note: All factual claims have adjacent citations [1]-[8].

completeness.note: Major evidence rows (regulatory status, cost savings, limitations) are addressed per completeness checklist.

flow.note: Sections follow logical order but Comparative and Efficacy sections overlap in CMS estimates.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Prose uses hedging language like 'projected', 'estimated', and 'may omit' to reflect uncertainty.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded with no promotional language detected.
